"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\radiance3d.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\radiance3d.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\radiance3d.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -o lib\radiance3d.cp314-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\radiance3d.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\radiance3d.dir\linkLibs.rsp
